1: Even Even unto God with my voice; and he gave ear unto me.
2: My sore ran in the night, and ceased not: My soul refused to be comforted.
3: I complained, and my spirit was overwhelmed. Selah. Selah.
4: I am so troubled that I cannot speak.
6: I commune with mine own heart: And my spirit made diligent search.
7: And will he be favourable no more?
8: Doth his his promise fail for evermore?
9: Hath he in anger shut up his tender mercies? Selah. Selah.
10: But I will remember But I will remember the years of the right hand of the Most High.
11: Surely I will remember thy wonders of old.
13: Who is so is so great a God as our our God?
14: Thou hast declared thy strength among the people.
15: The sons of Jacob and Joseph. Selah. Selah.
18: The lightnings lightened the world: The earth trembled and shook.
19: And thy footsteps are not known.
20: By the hand of Moses and Aaron.
